description: Seed patterns for the audit/business-logic family. Hits target workflow state transitions, idempotency mechanisms, payment / refund flows, multi-step approval logic, and compensating actions. Most business-logic findings require domain understanding — the skill flags structural risks (missing idempotency, racy state checks).
notes: This is the most manual-heavy family. ripgrep can only find STRUCTURAL markers (idempotency keys, state-transition functions). The actual 'is the rule correct?' question requires reading the spec and the code.
Focus the skill on: missing idempotency on side-effectful endpoints, race-prone double-spend patterns, state transitions that skip required intermediate states.

javascript_typescript.false_positive_notes: High frequency in any commerce app; useful as a density signal.
Presence is positive; absence is the concern on side-effectful endpoints.
Stable; the question is whether transitions are guarded.
Good sign when present around multi-step updates.

go.false_positive_notes: Stable; check rollback on error path.

go.description: looplab/fsm — popular Go finite-state-machine library. Audit transition guards + event handlers.
Temporal SDK — distributed workflow orchestration. Multi-step durable workflows.
go.false_positive_notes: Stable Temporal API. Activity idempotency + workflow versioning are the audit targets.

go.description: Go payment SDK markers (stripe-go, braintree-go, etc.)
Decimal / big.Float / big.Rat for money — correct numeric types vs float64 (which has rounding bugs)

java.description: Spring scheduled jobs — business workflows on a clock
Spring Kafka — async event-driven business logic
java.false_positive_notes: Stable Kafka API; investigate at-least-once vs exactly-once.

java.description: BigDecimal arithmetic — monetary calculations require correct scale/rounding
java.false_positive_notes: Investigate rounding mode (HALF_UP vs HALF_EVEN matters).

kotlin.description: Android WorkManager — multi-step background job lifecycle (queue → run → retry → cancel). State persistence in WorkSpec table.
kotlin.false_positive_notes: Stable AndroidX marker. Audit unique-name collisions + idempotency of doWork().

kotlin.description: Google Play Billing — in-app purchase lifecycle. Receipt verification MUST happen server-side; client-only validation is bypassable.
kotlin.false_positive_notes: Stable. Audit: is the purchase token verified against Play Developer API on backend?

kotlin.description: Payment/financial operation inside async/launch — concurrent payment is a duplicate-charge risk
kotlin.false_positive_notes: FN: if charge is inside a service call deeper than the launch block. High signal when direct.

kotlin.description: Google Tink usage — high-level crypto framework. Audit key rotation + keyset storage location.
kotlin.false_positive_notes: Positive signal (Tink is safer than raw JCA). Audit keyset persistence.

kotlin.description: Room database transaction boundary — multi-step DB consistency
Firebase Auth lifecycle — login / token refresh / reauth state
kotlin.false_positive_notes: Stable. Audit: is getIdToken(forceRefresh=true) used before privileged operations?

php.description: Symfony Workflow component — declarative state machine definitions
php.false_positive_notes: Stable Symfony marker. The Workflow definition's transition guards are the security-relevant code.

php.description: Workflow transition operations — runtime state changes
php.false_positive_notes: Variable name may differ; matches typical $workflow-> usage.

php.description: ExpressionLanguage usage — runtime DSL evaluation in security voters, workflow guards, cache attributes
php.false_positive_notes: Critical when the expression string is user-influenced. Trace string origin.

php.description: Arbitrary-precision math / money libraries — usage implies financial domain, decimal-scaling bugs possible
php.false_positive_notes: High signal in fintech / e-commerce repos.
->consume on non-limiter objects (database transactions) is a noise source.

php.description: Idempotency-key handling — replay-safety for side-effectful operations
Saga pattern markers — multi-step distributed transaction with compensation
php.false_positive_notes: Less common in pure PHP; high signal when present.

php.description: Quota / throttle / usage-limit markers — business invariants
php.false_positive_notes: Very common keyword set; useful as density signal in admin/billing modules.
isGranted is the Symfony Security idiom; verify subject + attribute pair.

php.description: Payment / billing keywords (PHP idiom — Stripe SDK, Symfony Payum, Laravel Cashier)
php.false_positive_notes: Distinct from js-payment-keywords (different pattern: includes adyen/mollie typical in PHP stacks).

swift.description: Apple StoreKit transaction handling — in-app purchase state. Receipt MUST be verified server-side via App Store Server API.
swift.false_positive_notes: Stable Apple API. Audit: is transaction.id sent to server for verification BEFORE granting entitlement?

swift.description: Receipt validation — client-side validation is bypassable. Must POST receipt to your server, which verifies with Apple.
swift.false_positive_notes: Hits on client-only verification are FINDINGS.

swift.description: iOS Keychain access — sensitive credential storage. Audit kSecAttrAccessible level + access groups.
swift.false_positive_notes: Audit: kSecAttrAccessibleAfterFirstUnlock or stricter. AccessibleAlways is bad.

swift.description: Foundation Decimal / NSDecimalNumber — for money calculations. Audit rounding mode + scale.
swift.false_positive_notes: Use of Double for money is the bug; use of Decimal is the fix.

swift.description: Apple Pay PassKit primitives — payment authorization flow
swift.false_positive_notes: Audit merchantCapabilities + countryCode + paymentToken handling (token must go to your payment processor).

csharp.description: MediatR — request/handler/pipeline pattern. Multi-step orchestration with handler chaining.
csharp.false_positive_notes: Stable MediatR API. Each IRequest is a state transition; investigate handler side-effects + idempotency.

csharp.description: Stateless library — declarative state machine. Audit transition guards and OnEntry/OnExit side-effects.
csharp.false_positive_notes: Stable. The transition table is the security spec.

csharp.description: NServiceBus Saga — multi-step distributed transaction. Audit compensation logic + timeout handling.
Windows Workflow Foundation — legacy but still used. Long-running stateful workflows.
csharp.false_positive_notes: Legacy framework, audit for stateful behaviour + bookmarks (resumption points).

csharp.description: EF Core transaction boundary — multi-step DB consistency
csharp.false_positive_notes: Stable EF Core. Audit retry policy + isolation level.

csharp.description: Payment / billing SDK markers (.NET Stripe, Braintree, Adyen, PayPal, Square)
csharp.false_positive_notes: Distinct lang_group; no clash with js-payment-keywords.

csharp.description: Decimal / NodaMoney usage — correct numeric type for monetary calculations (vs float/double)
csharp.false_positive_notes: Presence positive. Audit Math.Round mode (Banker's rounding default).

rust.description: statig / sm! macro — Rust state-machine crates

rust.false_positive_notes: Less mature than Go/Java/Python SDKs but real.

rust.description: rust_decimal crate — fixed-precision arithmetic for money
